name: Carter Comfort Systems
review_snippets: cannot say enough positive things about this company; they are highly knowledgeable and thorough professionals who are great to work with
prompt service with technicians being friendly to work with
homepage_text_excerpt: Carter Comfort Systems is a family-owned and operated HVAC company that has served Caldwell, Boise, and the greater Treasure Valley, Idaho for over 25 years. The company offers installation, repair, and maintenance for air conditioning systems, furnaces, heat pumps, and indoor air quality products such as air purifiers, humidifiers, and dehumidifiers. It is a Certified Trane Comfort Specialist and BBB-accredited business, and it promotes free estimates and flexible financing options to make HVAC service accessible to homeowners and contractors. The site includes a dedicated 'Schedule My Estimate' page, a testimonials page, and an FAQ section, and lists individual service-area pages for surrounding communities including Emmett, Fruitland, Nampa, and Horseshoe Bend, Idaho. Installed systems are backed by a 10-year warranty.

name: River City Heating & Air
review_snippets: best HVAC crew in the Metro Richmond area with great prices and superior work
new York HVAC systems that have performed great since day one
Brian ... professional, personable, and providing excellent work
homepage_text_excerpt: River City Heating & Air is a locally owned and operated HVAC company that has proudly served the Richmond, Virginia area since 2006. The company provides residential and commercial installation, repair, and maintenance for air conditioners, heat pumps, and furnaces, along with duct cleaning, indoor air quality, and preventative maintenance plans. Licensed and insured technicians are certified to install and service Trane, Lennox, York, Goodman, Mitsubishi Electric, and American Standard equipment, and installations come with manufacturer warranties, including options for 10-year extended parts and labor coverage. The company offers free estimates and promotional financing through Synchrony for customers who need help affording repairs or replacements. Its website lists service pages for numerous Richmond-area communities, including Henrico, Hanover, Ashland, Mechanicsville, Sandston, Moseley, and Lakeside, Virginia, and features a dedicated customer reviews/testimonials page.

name: Advantage Air Mechanical
review_snippets: I have always counted on their team to properly diagnose and fix the issue. And they don't jump to the conclusion of replacing your AC like some other companies. They are always on time and courteous.
He examined the unit, explained the problem, brought the required parts, and repaired the unit. I appreciate his honesty and diligence.
homepage_text_excerpt: Advantage Air Mechanical is a family-owned and locally operated HVAC and plumbing company that has served Tucson, Arizona homeowners and businesses for over 30 years, founded by Tucson native Ken Bedient. Technicians are NATE-certified and factory trained on major equipment brands including York, Carrier, American Standard, Bryant, Rheem, Trane, and Ruud. The company promotes free in-home estimates with transparent, fixed-price quotes, load calculations for correctly sized replacement systems, and low- or no-interest financing plans through Synchrony for installs and repairs. Warranties are offered on installations and repairs, with an extended 2-year labor warranty for members of its maintenance program. The site includes dedicated About Us, Contact, Financing, and customer reviews ('See What People Are Saying About Us') pages, plus service-area pages for Tucson neighborhoods such as Ventana Canyon.

name: Harker Heating & Cooling
review_snippets: I would highly recommend them for knowing how to treat a customer.
I was incredibly impressed with Tanner's work and would highly recommend him and Harker Heating and Cooling to anyone!
a technician identified the problem quickly, answered questions patiently, and the repair was taken care of quickly, courteously, and professionally
homepage_text_excerpt: Harker Heating & Cooling is a locally owned and operated residential and commercial HVAC company that has served Madison and Dane County, Wisconsin since 1949. The company maintains a showroom on West Beltline Highway in Madison displaying furnaces, air conditioners, water heaters, and radiant heat options, and emphasizes that it is a local, community-invested business rather than a national franchise. Technicians are union-trained and certified and are licensed to work on gas, electric, and oil boilers. The site offers complimentary quote estimates with transparent, upfront pricing before work begins, special financing through Synchrony with multiple no-interest and low-payment plan options, and documentation of completed work and warranty terms. It includes About Us, Contact, Locations, FAQ, testimonials, and online-reviews pages, along with active Facebook and Instagram accounts.

name: Horizon Homes
review_snippets: If you are looking for heat pumps or insulation installed I highly recommend Horizon Homes.
homepage_text_excerpt: Horizon Homes is a family-owned weatherization and heat pump contractor based in Westbrook, Maine, serving Greater Portland homes since 2006. The company specializes in cold-climate heat pump installation, air sealing, and blown-in insulation, and holds Mitsubishi Diamond Contractor status, its highest dealer tier, requiring rigorous ongoing certification. Free home energy assessments are performed by BPI-certified contractors, who calculate rebate eligibility through the National Energy Improvement Fund and Efficiency Maine programs and provide a detailed written quote specifying exact recommended equipment. As a Diamond Contractor, Horizon Homes offers an extended 12-year parts warranty on installed heat pump systems, compared to the standard 5-year warranty offered by many installers. The site includes About Us, Contact, FAQ, Testimonials, and Locations pages covering towns across Greater Portland, plus a blog section with detailed case studies of individual home energy projects.
